_comment: Retrieval eval set (spec §5). Each item: a question and the note id(s) that SHOULD be retrieved. Score search_notes against this at stage 1 (keyword) and stage 2 (embeddings); the delta is the headline result. Grow to ~15-25 items. The third item below deliberately uses no shared keywords with its target note to expose where keyword search fails and embeddings win.

items.question: How does RouteMorph justify its stop ordering?
What does the Geopogo accessibility checker look at?
Why can't simple word-matching find related notes?
